docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 78829810) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOODWARD, NICHOLAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 589 POST STREET, UNIT #304 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 78829810)

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 78743071) AS TO DEFENDANT WOODWARD, NICHOLAS
